latest.title: Bears smell food from miles away
latest.script_key: bears can smell a meal long before seeing it watch the nose first because smell drives many bear decisions before the eyes do that huge scent map helps them find food avoid danger and read who crossed the area earlier would you trust your nose that much

latest.title: The moon keeps one face turned toward Earth
latest.script_key: the moon shows us one face for a reason watch the moon s position because its rotation and orbit are locked together it spins once in about the same time it circles earth so the same side keeps facing us that is synchronized motion not stillness which orbit clue next

latest.title: Lions aren't lazy—they're energy accountants
latest.script_key: that lion s not resting it s saving fuel watch his ears twitch more than his paws that s because he s hunting without moving his brain s already picking up prey sounds from a mile away his body runs on fumes until the perfect second did you think lions were lazy or strategists

latest.title: Utah rock layers are secretly upside down
latest.script_key: these ridges flipped themselves inside out see how the stripes curve the wrong way that s because a 700 foot slab of rock got shoved up and over like a rug the soft layers ended up on top that s why it looks wrong because it is ever hiked a canyon and felt the ground should look different

reasons: script does not expose enough concrete visual detail
latest.title: Lightning makes air explode into thunder
latest.script_key: lightning can jump sideways see it in this city shot that bolt didn t come down it leapt 200 feet to the side that s why storms can fry electronics even when the sky looks quiet ever felt a charged breeze before a storm maybe you re picking up on this

latest.title: Mangroves take power out of waves
latest.script_key: mangroves can slow waves before they hit land watch the roots in the water because mangroves create a rough barrier that breaks up wave energy they also shelter young fish and hold muddy coastlines together restoration can be infrastructure made of roots which repair story next

latest.title: Rock layers store ancient environments in stripes
latest.script_key: rock layers are time stamps made of stone watch the stripe pattern because each layer can mark a different setting river mud ocean floor windblown sand or volcanic ash stack enough layers and the cliff becomes a timeline which rock clue should we read next

latest.title: Storm clouds show air layers changing over time
latest.script_key: storm clouds show air layers changing over time watch the cloud deck because winds at different heights can push each layer in a different direction a timelapse turns that invisible motion into a map which sky motion should we read next
